name: Buffalo-Style Crab Claws
recipeIngredient: 16 Alaska snow crab or blue, crab cocktail claws
recipeInstructions:
1. Whisk together all ingredients for the butter mixture in a small bowl, except for the crab claws and dipping sauce.
2. Arrange the crab claws on a broiling pan and brush both sides of each claw with the butter mixture.
3. Broil 5-6 inches from the heat source for 3-4 minutes, or until the crab is heated through. Remove from the oven.
4. Brush the remaining butter mixture over the crab claws.
5. Serve the crab claws on a platter with the Dipping Sauce. Whisk all sauce ingredients together before serving.
